MODULE: cosmos.core.multimodal.subvocalizer
FILE: cosmos/core/multimodal/subvocalizer.py (104 lines)
CATEGORY: core

DESCRIPTION: HARMONIC SUBVOCALIZER (THE INNER VOICE)
=======================================
Converts text into 12D "Mental Audio" frequencies.
Allows the model to "hear" what it reads silently.

CLASSES:
- Subvocalizer: The 'Voice Box' of the 12D Mind.
Maps characters to harmonic frequencies based o
  Methods: def generate_char_sound(self, char, duration=0.1)
  Methods: def subvocalize_text(self, text, speed=1.0)
